mapper.sql: SELECT aul.id, aul.user_id, u.email AS user_email, aul.application_case_id, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, aul.feature_type, aul.status, aul.model, aul.input_tokens, aul.output_tokens, aul.token_usage, aul.credit_used, aul.error_message, aul.created_at FROM ai_usage_log aul JOIN users u ON aul.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN application_case ac ON aul.application_case_id = ac.id
